reasoning_content:
We have made significant changes to the lexer to include more tokens and location tracking.
 However, the score for task1 is still 57.14, which is not full. We need to get a higher score.
 The current lexer does not handle the location and formatting as required. We added an emit override to format the tokens.
 Also, we added actions in the lexer rules to update the location (currentFilename, currentLine, currentCol, atStartOfLine, hadLeadingSpace) for LineAfterPreprocessing, Whitespace, and Newline.
 We are now going to rebuild and run the task1-score again.

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC/build && cmake --build . -t task1 && cmake --build . -t task1-score", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Rebuild and score Task 1"}
